intro: Tragacantha tebesiensis, a type of spiny shrub or perennial plant, belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the management of conditions like arthritis and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha tebesiensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into ointments and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
